title: CECRI Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 05 Junior Research Fellow Posts
description: The Central Electrochemical Research Institute (CECRI) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 05 Junior Research Fellow Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech can apply for the CECRI Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selec...
